title: Deep Seabed Mining Law Corpus
domain: Deep seabed mining law — mineral resources of 'the Area' (UNCLOS Part XI, ISA regime, US track)
coverage_note: Full corpus holds ~10 instruments across the international (UNCLOS/ISA) regime and the US non-treaty track, including the draft ISA Mining Code. This connector ships a small sample only.
license_note: Compilation CC BY 4.0; source texts (UNCLOS, ISA instruments, US regulations) are official public documents and keep their own terms.
